results.title: Why there will not be a handshake in French Open semi-final between Andreeva and Kostyuk with possible Russia-Ukraine final causing tension in Paris
results.description: The women's semi-finals at the French Open will be played out today. In what should be a spectacular day of dramatic and high stakes tennis may be overshadowed by the constant events ongoing in the Russian-Ukraine war and the tension Ukrainians feel with Russian and Belarusian players.

results.title: Looking back on top teams from the Bayside South during the 2025-26 season
results.description: With the high school sports season over, here is a look back on the top teams from the Bayside South during the 2025-26 season.

results.title: Sabalenka ‘mentally off track’ as French Open exit made her want to ‘quit’ - Al Jazeera
results.description: Sabalenka ‘mentally off track’ as French Open exit made her want to ‘quit’ Al Jazeera Sabalenka says she wants ‘to quit tennis’ after shock French Open defeat by Shnaider The Guardian French Open 2026: Aryna Sabalenka sees another Grand Slam chance disappear after Diana Shnaider defeat in Paris BBC From 6-3, 4-1 down, Shnaider stuns Sabalenka to make first Slam semifinal WTA Tennis Quote of the day by Aryna Sabalenka: “Sometimes you just need to let it go, to empty it so you’re ready to start over” The Times of India
